question.question: I think later scholars {a1} this correspondence as the turning point in the entire dispute.

source.name: Custom: Will vs Be Going To All Levels (C2)

tag.name: Will vs Be Going To All Levels

variants.text: I think later scholars {a1} this correspondence as the turning point in the entire dispute.

hints.hint:
Form: **will + base verb**.
We use **will** for an opinion, assumption, or neutral prediction without direct evidence.
Example: *I think later scholars will view this correspondence as the turning point in the entire dispute.*

Forma: **will + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
Używamy **will** do wyrażenia opinii, przypuszczenia lub neutralnej prognozy bez bezpośrednich dowodów.
Przykład: *I think later scholars will view this correspondence as the turning point in the entire dispute.*

Форма: **will + V1**.
Вживаємо **will** для думки, припущення або нейтрального передбачення без прямого видимого доказу.
Приклад: *I think later scholars will view this correspondence as the turning point in the entire dispute.*

chatgpt_explanations.explanation:

Example: *I think later scholars will view this correspondence as the turning point in the entire dispute.*
